summary: This document contains system prompts for an AI psychologist agent designed to interact with elderly users in both English and Spanish. It defines the agent's persona as a compassionate professional with a Simon Sinek tone, outlining the specific flow for initial welcome interactions. The file is located in a deprecated folder, indicating this was an earlier iteration of the product's conversational design.
